title: C418 Music To Disc's Port
description: Aims to port most of C418's in game music tracks to actual Music Discs
body:
**This mod aims to port most/all of C418's in game music tracks to actual Music Discs** Current discs include * Haggstrom * Minecraft * Moog City * Subwoofer Lullaby * Wet Hands * Dry Hands * Living Mice * Mice On Venus * Sweden Other Items in this mod * New Disc Fragment (its like the Disc Fragment 5) but its craftable with 1 iron nugget

If your someone like me, then you probably want a discount right? Well why didn't you just say so, use the discount code BUBBY for a 25% Off your first month at https://wabbanode.com/affiliate/bubby
